svg.text: Autonomous B2B Quote Generation · LangGraph Orchestration · Qwen2.5 Reasoning · Alibaba Cloud Deployment
StateGraph · AgentState schema · SQLite-backed checkpointer (interrupt_before human_approval_gate)
Interrupt checkpoint: LangGraph genuinely pauses at Human Approval — resumes exactly where it stopped via update_state()
Pure reasoning only — returns {decision, confidence_score, reasoning_summary}. Never controls routing.
Single typed object threaded through every node
agents/: intake_parser · risk_fraud · negotiation (Qwen) · pricing (deterministic) · pdf_generation
Dashboard polls task_state · audit_log · pricing_rules directly (read-only, 5s refresh) — never a second source of truth
OUTPUT LIFECYCLE — from PDF Quote Generator to the client's browser
Scans to /rfq/{task_id}/status — live audit trail, closing the loop
Qwen2.5 reasoning call (data only, never routes)
